title: Area Light Sources
blurb: Soft shadows from a spherical light, approximated by Monte-Carlo sampling. Watch the shadow noise vanish as the sample count climbs from 1 to 49.

cards.title: Area Light - 1 sample
cards.desc: A spherical light softly illuminating boxes and a ball, sampled with 1x1 = 1 Monte-Carlo shadow samples per point. Very noisy with a single sample.
cards.meta: 1024x1024  -  1 ray/pixel  -  1x1 = 1 area-light samples  -  rendered in 0.4 s

cards.title: Area Light - 4 samples
cards.desc: A spherical light softly illuminating boxes and a ball, sampled with 2x2 = 4 Monte-Carlo shadow samples per point. Softening as samples increase.
cards.meta: 1024x1024  -  1 ray/pixel  -  2x2 = 4 area-light samples  -  rendered in 0.9 s
